case_title: WILSON, HENRY vs. FYFFE, JACK et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT FYFFE, JACK BAIRD, JULIE ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS

HENRY WILSON IN PRO PER VS. JACK FYFFE AND JULIE (BOTH IN PRO PER) BAIRD 4:10 P.M. C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. CASE SETTLED BY PRO TEM JUDGE ROSE TRACY. BRENDA FIELDS, REPORTER. PLAINTIFF SHALL HAVE JUDGMENT FOR THE POSSESSION OF THE PREMISE LOCATED AT 55 MASON STREET THE AMBASDOR HOTEL ROOM #407 SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94102, AS AND AGAINST DEFENDANTS JACK FYFFE AND JULIE BAIRD. WRIT TO ISSUE NOW, STAY EXECUTION OF WRIT TO 10/3/93 AT 12:00 P.M. IF DEFENDANTS VACATE PRIOR TO 10/3/93, PLAINTIFF SHALL DISMISS THE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE WITHIN ONE WEEK OF THE VACATING OF BOTH DEFENDANTS, IF THE VACATING IS PRIOR TO 10/3/93 AT 12:00 P.M.
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES FILED BY DEFENDANT FYFFE, JACK BAIRD, JULIE ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES FILED BY DEFENDANT FYFFE, JACK BAIRD, JULIE ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $15.67 FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILSON, HENRY
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT FYFFE, JACK BAIRD, JULIE
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT FYFFE, JACK BAIRD, JULIE
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT FYFFE, JACK BAIRD, JULIE

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FYFFE, JACK BAIRD, JULIE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 55 MASON STREET #407 SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94102, STAYED UNTIL OCT-03-1993, LEASE FORFEITED, PLTF.TO FILE DISMISSAL AND VACATE JUDGMENT IF DEFTS. VACATE PRIOR TO 12:00 P.M. ON 10/2/93; PLTF. TO FILE VACATION OF JUDGMENT WITHIN ONE WEEK IF DEFENDANTS VACATE PRIOR TO 12:00 P.M. ON 10/2/93. WRIT TO ISSUE FORTHWITH; STAY PHYSICAL EVICTION TO 10/2/93.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILSON, HENRY AS TO DEFENDANT FYFFE, JACK BAIRD, JULIE DOES 1 TO 4 SUMMONS ISSUED
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES,

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILSON, HENRY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR SEP-14-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON SEP-21-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT FYFFE, JACK BAIRD, JULIE
